hee5cbc7eg21d1g42e6g9ae7g880d099ceb47: Amid all this grandeur sunk into squalor, I wonder what dismal corner we'll find Halsin in.
hff80a6c1g5951g47b7g8329g485a060ed9cf: Prisoners are treated the same by everyone: they serve as serfs, or they waste away in a dungeon.
hb89a50d7g32d8g4606g9a87g925f1f581cbb: Stands to reason we'll find Halsin in either one of these less-than-appealing conditions.
h28746e33gf02cg4ee4gb0ecgbc81e28a45a5: This must have been a splendid complex once, a temple of impressive proportions.
hf55d251bg85b9g4bbag8302g6da46396ed0d: Worshippers lived here. Pilgrims visited. They required food, shelter, ceremony, entertainment.
h90fb6377ga558g4ceagbe67gac225a58865c: Now that it's nothing but a goblin-ridden death-trap? Plenty of places to hide away a druid, I imagine.
h7285ffc6g2fcag4dd6gbbddg699a1e84b6c7: With our luck? Marinating in a cooking pot most likely.
h12c42981g469dg40d1gb0a3g991eed886c74: A hearty serving of druid stew wouldn't do us any good. No, let's hope for the best and keep this in mind:
h33cc31a8g2f40g4a7bgb1f0ga5c26e2cb127: If he's still alive, it stands to reason we'll find Halsin in either one of these less-than-appealing conditions.
head14d1bgd2a7g4ae2g88a0g8726378ed05d: Well - more-than-appealing conditions come to think of it, when one considers the stew alternative.
